digest.greeting: Thursday, June 4, Jean. Today is anchored by the Jean/Sara 1:1, the 11:30 AM Portfolio alignment meeting, the BCP/Incident Response weekly, and the late-day Tudo Bem! team meeting. You have 9 active calendar blocks, 3 carried-over items, 3 urgent/high-interest items, and no active reminders. The main things to move early are KPI final approval, remaining CoE/TL follow-up, and portfolio/CoE alignment; the clearest risk is Incident Response prioritization still needing leadership clarity. Outlook calendar and email worked; broad Teams recent-thread discovery returned a Microsoft 403, so Teams context uses narrower Teams search results plus Outlook activity signals.

items.label: KPIs - confirm final approval
items.detail: Carry-over from Wednesday's daily digest. Mid-Year Touchpoints launched in Rippling; confirm all KPIs are approved/finalized after the KPI Review with Sara and close this out.

items.label: Follow up with TLs on CoE guide
items.detail: Carry-over from Wednesday's daily digest. Dar seguimiento a los Team Leads sobre su revision del CoE Brief Guide con sus PMs/PEs. Janet confirmed her team; verify the remaining Team Leads.

items.label: Complete Nadia's affected-areas request
items.detail: Carry-over from Wednesday's daily digest. Complete Nadia Wilson's request on affected project areas for the EPMO; yesterday's Salesforce Program Overview remains the supporting context.

sections.title: Today's Schedule
sections.note: Times shown in Jean's Outlook working timezone. The canceled Javier Hurtado interview still appears on the calendar at 11:30 AM, but newer Rippling email shows it moved to Tuesday, June 9.

items.label: Jean/Sara 1:1
items.detail: Sara restarted the weekly 1:1 series. Good slot to close KPI approval, CoE guide/TL follow-up, and remaining Nadia/Salesforce dependency context.

items.label: 1:1 Santiago & Jean
items.detail: Regular 30-minute 1:1. Use if Santiago has input on active project alignment or open PM Phase 2 items.

items.label: Portfolio alignment
items.detail: Jorge Grijalva's meeting with Sara and Jean to align on changes from the portfolio review with Jill and define next steps. The invite includes the EPMO May Portfolio tracker link.

items.label: Blocked Space
items.detail: Protected focus window after the Portfolio alignment meeting and before the afternoon stack. Best use: send the CoE/TL follow-up or clean up KPI/Nadia notes while context is fresh.

items.label: Weekly Meeting: BCP/Incident Response
items.detail: Project touchpoint with Legal/IR stakeholders. Tessa Lawrence declined today's occurrence, so confirm whether survey/prioritization decisions can still move without her in the room.

items.label: 1:1 Camilo & Jean
items.detail: Starts immediately after BCP/Incident Response, creating a tight transition.

items.label: 1:1 Maria & Jean
items.detail: Agenda includes portfolio review, roadblocks, and next steps. Strong follow-up window for CoE priority and portfolio alignment threads.

items.label: 1:1 Andrea and Jean
items.detail: Exception occurrence. Andrea previously proposed moving this due to a COI conflict; Outlook now shows the 3:00 PM slot.

items.label: Tudo Bem!'s Weekly Meeting
items.detail: Main team coordination forum. Good place to close the loop on Jhara's OneDrive/SharePoint/Venn issue and any portfolio-impacting blockers.

items.label: Align CoE priorities with Jorge
items.detail: Review Jorge Grijalva's Portfolio Review Summary and today's Portfolio alignment meeting. Action type: follow up/decide. Jorge and Jean are explicitly named to ensure alignment on CoE priorities and upcoming work.

items.label: Clarify Incident Response priority path
items.detail: Teams search found Jean noting no response yet from Cristian Garcia or Chelsea related to Jill's response on prioritizing the project. Action type: follow up. Use today's BCP/Incident Response weekly to confirm the leadership path and next alignment call.

items.label: Review Rippling task queue
items.detail: Rippling reports one new task, Complete survey: Incident Response Survey, due June 12, plus an overdue harassment prevention training task from December 9, 2025. Action type: review/complete.

items.label: Check Supabase security warning
items.detail: Unread Supabase email reports a critical table-publicly-accessible/RLS-disabled issue on Jean's project. Action type: review/decide whether the project is still active and whether the security advisory needs remediation.

items.label: Decide whether to restore expired recording
items.detail: SharePoint says the Weekly Touchpoint Staff Augmentation Project meeting recording expired and was deleted. Action type: decide. Restore from recycle bin only if that recording is still needed for Staff Augmentation context.

items.label: Portfolio Review Summary & Action Items
items.detail: From Jorge Grijalva. The summary says statuses, priorities, ownership, and notes were updated in the portfolio tracker; Jorge and Jean need to ensure alignment on CoE priorities and upcoming work.

items.label: Portfolio alignment invite
items.detail: From Jorge Grijalva, unread. Meeting purpose is to align on recent portfolio review changes with Jill and next steps; review the linked EPMO May Portfolio tracker before the 11:30 AM meeting.

items.label: Javier Hurtado interview moved
items.detail: Rippling sent updated candidate materials showing the Project Coordinator interview for Javier Hurtado on Tuesday, June 9 at 11:30 AM EDT. Today's 11:30 AM calendar item is canceled, so no interview prep is needed this morning beyond noting the reschedule.

items.label: Monitor request #0027951
items.detail: Mar Garcia followed up with Dana on request #0027951 and copied Jean and Anu Puri. Action type: monitor/follow up if EPMO needs to help escalate after Dana responds.

sections.title: Teams Highlights
sections.note: Broad recent-thread discovery returned Microsoft 403; these items come from narrower Teams searches that succeeded.

items.label: Jhara - OneDrive/SharePoint and Venn issue
items.detail: In Tudo Bem! - PM Phase 2 Team, Jhara asked whether others are seeing the same OneDrive/SharePoint issue and whether Venn is involved. Keep the carried-over monitoring path closed only after the team confirms status.

items.label: Incident Response priority still needs clarity
items.detail: Teams search surfaced Jean's note that Cristian Garcia or Chelsea had not responded related to Jill's prioritization direction. This is risk-signaling and ties directly to today's BCP/Incident Response meeting.

items.label: EPMO Team Meeting poll themes
items.detail: Recent EPMO Team Meeting chat activity was mostly poll-based and informational, with themes around blockers, approvals, scope creep, and turning stakeholder language into action items. No direct ask for Jean was visible in the returned results.

items.label: TRACE & Staff Aug touchpoint
items.detail: 15-minute recurring touchpoint with Yuri Almeida.

items.detail: Weekly sync with Yuri, Jhara, Andrea, Vidhi, Camilo, Mar, David, Santiago, and Anu.

items.label: CoE Sync Jean
items.detail: Mar Garcia's CoE sync with Jean and David.

items.label: EPMO EOW Check In
items.detail: Sara moved this one hour earlier and added Nadia for programmatic updates.

items.label: IT Litify Sprint #12 Planning / Executive Project Status Slide Update
items.detail: Two 3:00 PM calendar blocks overlap: Sprint #12 stakeholder planning and the Executive Project Status Slide Update. Confirm which one Jean should prioritize.
